brief_notes: Neuroimaging cross-species paper with 5 figures and tables. All R, MAE, and sample sizes verified against extraction: Mac→Mac R=0.5729/MAE=0.3758, Hum→Hum R=0.6153/MAE=1.1236, Mac→Hum R=0.4823/MAE=8.3610, Hum→Mac R=0.2898/MAE=7.6157, N=370 humans (170m/200f, 11.1±1.8 yrs), 181 macaques (89m/92f, 2.8±0.6 yrs), 62 common features, 117/239 species-specific. BCAP correlations also correctly reported. Reasonable structure with methods detailing MRI acquisition parameters.
